## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Ambient's content production progress, discuss keyword strategy, and refine article approach for gun detection in hospitals.](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production: 6 articles published, 1 staged for review. Impressions trending upward, SEO visibility improved from 0% to 1%.](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Refined vertical focus: Confirmed priority verticals (e.g., hospitals, schools, corporate campuses) and added new ones (e.g., cultural centers, aerospace).](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Article refinement: "Gun detection for hospitals" article to be reframed, focusing on holistic gun detection strategies beyond just AI solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Keyword strategy: Sydney to conduct keyword research for confirmed verticals, removing oil & gas, and focusing on building types and audience segments.](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [6 articles published, 1 staged for review in Strappy](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Impressions trending upward](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [SEO visibility improved from 0% to 1% (significant given competitor benchmarks of 2-4%)](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - ["AI and physical security" article being pulled by LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

### Vertical Focus Refinement

  - [Confirmed verticals: retail, hospitals, healthcare, schools, corporate campuses, warehouses, university campuses](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [New additions: utilities, data centers, museums/cultural centers, aerospace](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Removed: oil & gas, airports (no current customers)](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Focus on building types (e.g., spread-out campuses) in addition to verticals](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

### Keyword Strategy

  - [Sydney conducting keyword research for confirmed verticals](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Focus on audience segments and building types](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Slight repetition across articles acceptable to reinforce expertise](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Will add ideas to content OS for future runway](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

### Article Refinement: Gun Detection for Hospitals

  - [Reframe article to focus on holistic gun detection strategies](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Remove "proactive" framing (proactive refers to security approach, not detection itself)](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Include overview of various technologies (e.g., metal detectors, AI solutions)](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Highlight Ambient's AI capabilities within broader context](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Reference NYC incident article for systems integration perspective](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

  - [Team to review staged article in Strappy](https://fathom.video/share/bg3EfCbzxHhbykpv76eyzfvu7D_AFym-?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
